regime_fall.current_status: Following devastating US military strikes in early April 2026 that degraded Iran's military capabilities by 80-95%, a ceasefire negotiated on April 10 collapsed as Israeli strikes resumed in mid-June. The regime now faces critical military losses, severe economic isolation, institutional erosion under Supreme Leader control, and widespread internal unrest despite intense security crackdowns.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Post-ceasefire repression surge including over 700 arrests, IRGC/Basij raids across Iranian cities, and fatal shootings in Khomein and Hamedan on July 2, 2026, indicating regime consolidating control through internal security operations amid military losses.
